payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Black rectangular metal fireplace insert with a glass front revealing a dark, empty firebox and a light-colored ash or log-shaped remnant on the base; interior shows soot/dust staining around the edges; frontal near-camera view, approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.
